case_title: NGUYEN, DUNG K VS INTERSTATE FINANCIAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, DUNG K AS TO DEFENDANT INTERSTATE FINANCIAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO CLEVELAND (INTRA STATE FINANCIAL) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, DUNG K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERSTATE FINANCIAL $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.00, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT INTERSTATE FINANCIAL HEARING SET FOR MAR-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-07-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-02-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-21-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT INTERSTATE FINANCIAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
